mapper.sql: message_id, service_name, status, error_info, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mq_message_log (message_id, service_name, status, error_info, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{serviceName}, #{status}, #{errorInfo}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE mq_message_log SET service_name = #{serviceName}, status = #{status}, error_info = #{errorInfo}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
